122.reason: [Error: When q->num == p->num but q != p, it means the same value exists in the tree, but the function incorrectly assumes it must be in the right subtree. This can cause infinite recursion or wrong height if the node is actually in the left subtree of a node with the same value. The logic should search both subtrees or use pointer comparison only.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When q->num == p->num but q != p, it means the same value exists in the tree, but the function incorrectly assumes it must be in the right subtree. This can cause infinite recursion or wrong height if the node is actually in the left subtree of a node with the same value. The logic should search both subtrees or use pointer comparison only.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When q->num == p->num but q != p, it means the same value exists elsewhere in the tree. The function incorrectly assumes it must be in the right subtree, but the BST definition (left < root, right >= root) allows equal values in the right subtree. However, the recursive search for the node p should follow the BST property from the root, not assume the first match is the correct node. This logic is flawed because it may return incorrect height if there are duplicate values, and it does not properly search for the exact node p in the tree.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  错误：当值相等但节点不同时，直接向右查找，若重复值出现在左子树则无法正确找到目标节点
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When values are equal but nodes are different (e.g., duplicates), this incorrectly assumes the target is in the right subtree without checking left. Also, it may cause infinite recursion or wrong path if duplicate exists in left subtree.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This recursive call assumes p is in the right subtree, but if duplicates exist and p is actually in the left subtree due to insertion logic inconsistency, this will fail. Also, comparing by value alone can cause infinite recursion or wrong path when duplicate values exist.]

101.reason: 叶子节点判断错误：只检查右子树为空，应改为左右子树均为空

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  叶子节点判断错误：只检查右子树为空，应改为左右子树均为空
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  错误：叶子节点要求左右均为空，此处仅判断右子树为空，可能输出非叶子节点
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: incorrect condition for identifying leaf nodes; a leaf must have both children NULL, so it should be (p->left == NULL && p->right == NULL).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: Incorrect leaf node condition. A leaf node must have both left and right children as NULL. Should be (p->left == NULL && p->right == NULL).]
